title: The Brainiac
writer: Federico Curiel, Adolfo López Portillo, Antonio Orellana
actors: Abel Salazar, Ariadne Welter, David Silva
plot: In 1661 Mexico, the Baron Vitelius of Astara is sentenced to be burned alive by the Holy Inquisition of Mexico for witchcraft, necromancy, and other crimes. As he dies, the Baron swears vengeance against the descendants of the Inq...
